servers.name: PostgreSQL 16
servers.notes: Primary database. Must start before backend, worker, and mlflow.

servers.name: Redis 7
servers.notes: Session store, rate limiting, Celery broker + result backend.

servers.name: MinIO (S3-compatible)
servers.notes: Object storage for uploads, reports, ML artifacts. Console at :9001.

servers.name: FastAPI Backend
servers.notes: Main API server. Swagger UI at /docs in dev mode.

servers.name: Celery Worker (AI Detection)
servers.commandLocal: cd backend && celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info -Q text,image,audio,video,code,webhooks
servers.notes: Processes all detection jobs. GPU optional (NVIDIA).

servers.name: Celery Flower (Queue Monitor)
servers.notes: Celery task monitoring dashboard. Basic auth required.

servers.name: Next.js Frontend
servers.notes: Next.js 14 dev server with hot reload.

servers.name: MLflow Tracking
servers.notes: ML experiment tracking. Artifacts stored in MinIO.

backend-only.command: docker compose up postgres redis minio backend worker

frontend-dev.command: docker compose up postgres redis minio backend worker && cd frontend && npm run dev

infra-only.description: Just databases and storage (for local dev)
infra-only.command: docker compose up postgres redis minio
